scripts.check:skill: uv run --locked --default-index https://pypi.org/simple agentskills validate skills/preview
scripts.typecheck: yarn build && yarn workspaces foreach -Apt --exclude preview-workspace run typecheck
scripts.test: yarn workspace @nmnmcc/preview test && yarn workspace @nmnmcc/preview-react test && yarn workspace @nmnmcc/preview-vue test && yarn workspace @nmnmcc/preview-svelte test
scripts.test:e2e: yarn build && yarn examples:generate:built && yarn examples:build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.examples:generate:built: yarn workspace @preview/example-react generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-react-router generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-vue generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-svelte generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-sveltekit generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-vinext-app generate && yarn workspace @preview/example-vinext-pages generate
scripts.examples:build: yarn workspace @preview/example-react build && yarn workspace @preview/example-react-router build && yarn workspace @preview/example-vue build && yarn workspace @preview/example-svelte build && yarn workspace @preview/example-sveltekit build && yarn workspace @preview/example-vinext-app build && yarn workspace @preview/example-vinext-pages build
